## Summary

Describe what this PR changes and why.

## Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Refactor
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Security hardening

## Validation

- [ ] Built solution locally (`dotnet build SecureNova.sln -c Release`)
- [ ] Verified PowerShell scripts still run as expected
- [ ] Updated docs/configs where needed

## Security Impact

- [ ] No security impact
- [ ] Security-sensitive change (describe risk and mitigation)

## Checklist

- [ ] PR is scoped and focused
- [ ] No generated files (`bin/`, `obj/`, logs, findings) included
- [ ] Ready for review
